brand_identity.name: E1_Blog_Platform
brand_identity.description: A blog platform that rejects the generic 'bootstrap' look. It combines the layout precision of a Swiss magazine with the dark, immersive atmosphere of a developer's IDE.

buttons.default: rounded-none font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-xs h-12 px-8 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-foreground hover:text-background border border-border

cards.blog_tile: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-border/40 hover:border-border transition-colors duration-500

inputs.default: bg-background border-border/50 focus:border-foreground/50 focus:ring-0 rounded-none h-12

images.aspect_ratio_blog: aspect-[4/3] object-cover w-full h-full grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-700 ease-out

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}
motion.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid, deep colors (Zinc-950) with subtle noise texture if needed.
Typography is the UI. Use size and weight contrast instead of lines and borders where possible.
Input fields should look like they belong in a terminal or a high-end form, not a default bootstrap input.
All images must have a unified aspect ratio in lists (4:3 or 16:9).
Do not use generic 'Loading...' text. Use skeleton screens or subtle spinners.
Admin Dashboard: Dense, data-rich, functional. Public Blog: Airy, editorial, emotional.
Interactive elements must have clear :focus-visible states for accessibility.
Mobile Responsiveness is paramount. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

instructions_to_main_agent.frontend_setup: Update tailwind.config.js to include the specific colors and fonts defined in this JSON. Import Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_access: Implement a simple password gate. No complex auth. Store password in env var or hardcode for MVP.
instructions_to_main_agent.image_handling: When uploading images in Admin, convert to Base64 or upload to MongoDB GridFS. Ensure they are displayed with 'object-cover' CSS to maintain uniformity.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Use React Router. Public routes: '/', '/blog/:id'. Admin routes: '/admin', '/admin/dashboard', '/admin/create', '/admin/edit/:id'.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and links.
